mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, project_code, workflow_definition_code, name, version_id, trigger_type, status, dag_snapshot, runtime_params, var_pool, started_at, finished_at, owner_host, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_workflow_instance where workflow_definition_code = #{workflowDefinitionCode} order by created_at desc limit 1
select from t_r_workflow_instance where workflow_definition_code = #{workflowDefinitionCode} order by created_at desc
select from t_r_workflow_instance where project_code = #{projectCode} order by created_at desc

select from t_r_workflow_instance wi where wi.status = 'RUNNING' and wi.owner_host is not null and not exists ( select 1 from t_r_service_registry sr where sr.type = 'SERVER' and sr.status = 'ONLINE' and concat(sr.host, ':', sr.port) = wi.owner_host )
